name: Chronic Pain Program cohort - Adaptive Baseline + Occupation Mode
description: Major release adding adaptive pacing baselines (rolling 7-day average), occupation-based activity framing, and NRS accessibility improvements. Occupational therapist: Frank Schultz.

name: Occupational Therapy Therapist Portal v2 - workload & resource note Integration
description: Therapist-facing portal redesign with occupation-centered workload cards, auto-draft resource notes from pacing logs, and Frank's WCAG 2.1 AA recommendations.

name: Bitterroot Rehab Pilot Program
description: Professional pilot with Bitterroot Rehabilitation Center, Missoula MT. Point of contact: Frank Schultz. Target: 5 OTs, 15 participants. Coordinated with Dr. Lisa Tran.
